question: Source A claims X is true. Source B claims X is false. Which is current as of 2026?

supported_claims.claim: X is false as of 2026 — Source B supersedes Source A

unsupported_tempting_claims.claim: X is true because Source A was published first
unsupported_tempting_claims.why_tempting: Source A appears authoritative and was published earlier
unsupported_tempting_claims.why_unsupported: Source A was retracted and superseded by Source B

contradictory_evidence.conflict_description: Source A originally claimed X; Source B contradicts; Source A was later retracted
contradictory_evidence.resolution: Source B is current; Source A was retracted 2025-12-01

temporal_version_constraints.version_dependency: retraction invalidates all claims from Source A

hallucination_traps.trap: Picking Source A without checking retraction status

human_reviewed_rationale: Reviewed — tests contradiction resolution with retraction awareness
